configuration.name: debugEnabled
configuration.title: Log additional information to the console

configuration.name: mapBoxToken
configuration.title: Map Box Access Token (required for Mapbox)
configuration.description: Go to https://account.mapbox.com/auth/signup/ to sign up and get a Access Token.

configuration.name: nrqlQueries
configuration.title: NRQL Queries
configuration.description: NRQL queries for marker data (must include `name:` alias and lat/lng)

items.name: accountId
items.title: Account ID
items.description: Account ID to be associated with the query

items.name: useNameAsLabel
items.title: Use Name As Label (leaflet only)
items.description: Use the 'name:' alias as the label for markers (doesn't apply to HD mode)

items.name: enableFilters
items.title: Enable dashboard filters
items.description: Allows the use of dashboard filters

items.name: enableTimePicker
items.title: Enable Time Picker
items.description: Allows the use of the time picker

configuration.name: pollInterval
configuration.title: Select Poll Interval (seconds) default 60s
configuration.description: Rate at which the data is refreshed

configuration.name: initialLat
configuration.title: Initial Latitude
configuration.description: Initial latitude for the map center

configuration.name: initialLong
configuration.title: Initial Longitude
configuration.description: Initial longitude for the map center

configuration.name: initialZoom
configuration.title: Initial Zoom
configuration.description: Initial zoom level for the map center (1=world, 18=street level)

configuration.name: maxBoundsSouthWest
configuration.title: Max Bounds - Southwest corner eg. '35.5249, -124.6694' - Northeast config required
configuration.description: Restricts the view to the given geographical bounds, bouncing the user back if the user tries to pan outside the view

configuration.name: maxBoundsNorthEast
configuration.title: Max Bounds - Northeast corner eg. '40.0249, -120.1694' - Southeast config required
configuration.description: Restricts the view to the given geographical bounds, bouncing the user back if the user tries to pan outside the view

configuration.name: defaultMarkerColor
configuration.title: Default Marker Color
configuration.description: Fallback color for markers without threshold match (e.g., 'green', 'blue', '#FF5733')

configuration.name: markerStyle
configuration.title: Marker Style (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Visual style for markers: pin (default) or circle (modern)

configuration.name: defaultMarkerImgURL
configuration.title: Default Marker Image URL (overrides default marker color)
configuration.description: Custom marker icon URL (overrides color)

configuration.name: defaultImgWidth
configuration.title: Image width (default 25)
configuration.description: Marker icon width in pixels

configuration.name: defaultImgHeight
configuration.title: Image height (default 25)
configuration.description: Marker icon height in pixels

items.name: targetAttribute
items.title: Target Attribute eg. count, appName etc.

items.name: regexMatch
items.title: Regex Match (cannot be used with value equal, above, below)

items.name: status
items.title: Status (for cluster aggregation) (leaflet only)
items.description: Set marker status for cluster pie chart visualization

configuration.name: markerColors
configuration.title: Marker colors (leaflet only)
configuration.description: A comma separated list of hex colours in the order: cluster,no-status,ok,warning,critical. For heatmap mode, provide color stops.

configuration.name: enableClustering
configuration.title: Enable Marker Clustering (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Toggle marker clustering on/off (default: off)

configuration.name: markerAggregation
configuration.title: Marker aggregation (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Display value of clustered markers

configuration.name: enableWeatherLayer
configuration.title: Enable Weather Overlay (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Adds the current weather forecast as a map layer (default: false)

configuration.name: openWeatherApiKey
configuration.title: OpenWeather API Key (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Go to https://openweathermap.org/ and sign up to get an API key

configuration.name: weatherLayerType
configuration.title: Weather Layer Type (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Type of weather layer to display (default: precipitation)

configuration.name: weatherOpacity
configuration.title: Weather Layer Opacity (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Opacity for the weather layer - 0 to 1 (default: 0.7)

configuration.name: weatherMaxZoom
configuration.title: Weather Layer Max Zoom (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Maximum zoom level for the weather layer (default: 12)

configuration.name: showWeatherLegend
configuration.title: Show Weather Legend (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Display a color-scale legend for the active weather layer (default: false)

configuration.name: enableInclementWeatherEvents
configuration.title: Enable Inclement Weather Events (US only) (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Plot active weather alerts from the NWS (refreshed every 5 min)

configuration.name: weatherAlertMinSeverity
configuration.title: Minimum Weather Event Severity (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Show weather alerts at or above this severity level (default: Minor = show all)

configuration.name: disableClusterZoom
configuration.title: Disable Clustering at Zoom Level (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Zoom level at which clustering is disabled and all markers are shown (default: 7)

configuration.name: heatmapSteps
configuration.title: Marker Heatmap Steps (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Number of color steps for marker heatmap gradient. Set to 0 or leave empty to disable heatmap mode.

configuration.name: highDensityMode
configuration.title: High Density Mode (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Enable performance-optimized rendering using CircleMarkers for large datasets (1000+ points)

configuration.name: highDensityRadius
configuration.title: High Density Circle Radius (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Radius in pixels for high density mode markers (default: 6)

configuration.name: regionHeatmapSteps
configuration.title: Region Heatmap Steps (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Number of color steps for region heatmap. Set to 0 or leave empty to disable.

configuration.name: regionColors
configuration.title: Region Heatmap Colors (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Comma separated hex colors for region heatmap gradient stops

configuration.name: regionAccountId
configuration.title: Region Query Account ID (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Account ID for the region query (defaults to first marker query account)

configuration.name: regionQuery
configuration.title: Region Query (NRQL) (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Separate NRQL query for region data. Use geoISOCountry, geoUSState, geoUKRegion, or geoCANProvince fields to match GeoJSON.

configuration.name: enableRegionTimePicker
configuration.title: Enable Time Picker for Region Query (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Apply the dashboard time picker to the region query

configuration.name: hideMarkers
configuration.title: Disable Markers (default: false) (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Toggle to hide all markers/clusters on the map - useful to only show region heatmap

configuration.name: enableAutoTooltip
configuration.title: Auto-generate Tooltips (default: false) (leaflet only)
configuration.description: Automatically generate tooltip content from tooltip_* prefixed fields in query results

configuration.name: disableTooltipSorting
configuration.title: Disable Tooltip Sorting (default: false) (leaflet only)
configuration.description: When enabled, tooltip fields are displayed in the order defined in the NRQL SELECT clause instead of being alphabetically sorted

configuration.name: openDashboardsAsUrl
configuration.title: Open Dashboards as URL (default: false) (leaflet only)
configuration.description: When enabled, dashboards opened from tooltips will navigate to the dashboard UI directly (not as a modal)
